description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat and partially green roof, surrounded by a paved driveway and landscaped greenery. The front facade features a wide driveway leading to a garage, with a row of trees and shrubs providing privacy and curb appeal. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the exterior, allowing for ample natural light inside. The house has a clean, geometric design with white exterior walls and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and simplicity. The backyard and side areas are landscaped with grass, trees, and a blossoming tree, enhancing the residential feel. The main entryway is recessed, with a covered porch area and a simple, modern door.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat green roof, white exterior, large windows, and a landscaped driveway lined with trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main driveway, garage, entryway, and a row of trees and shrubs along the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garage, and the landscaped area with a blossoming tree and multiple trees along the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat green roof, large windows, and a grassy backyard area with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, additional windows, and the continuation of the landscaped driveway and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple modern door, covered porch, and minimal decorative elements
